config._comment: Mutation testing for the pure @jigswap/domain package. Uses the vitest runner (vite.config.ts type-strips TS). coverageAnalysis perTest keeps re-runs fast by only re-running tests that cover a mutant. Thresholds are documented in MUTATION-TESTING.md and set a few points below the measured baseline so CI stays green now but regressions break the build.
